title: Assess and purchase livestock
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assess and purchase livestock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify livestock markets

pcs.text: Identify and select livestock markets and methods to meet enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select livestock markets and methods to meet enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select livestock markets and methods to meet enterprise requirements.

pcs.text: Analyse risks associated with purchasing or accepting inappropriate livestock, and identify risk management strategies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse risks associated with purchasing or accepting inappropriate livestock, and identify risk management strategies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse risks associated with purchasing or accepting inappropriate livestock, and identify risk management strategies.

pcs.text: Identify regulatory requirements relating to selling and purchasing livestock
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify regulatory requirements relating to selling and purchasing livestock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify regulatory requirements relating to selling and purchasing livestock.

pcs.text: Establish networks and alliances, in accordance with legal and enterprise requirements, to ensure access to markets and gain market intelligence
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish networks and alliances, in accordance with legal and enterprise requirements, to ensure access to markets and gain market intelligence?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish networks and alliances, in accordance with legal and enterprise requirements, to ensure access to markets and gain market intelligence.

elements.title: Select livestock

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm enterprise specifications and requirements for livestock, including Quality Assurance (QA) arrangements for and with producers.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct livestock inspection procedures in accordance with workplace health and safety and animal welfare requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select livestock according to enterprise and customer specifications.

elements.title: Purchase livestock

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor livestock budget and take corrective action to address variations.
